title: Former Prince Andrew Sublet Cottages on Royal Property Where He Lived Rent-Free
summary_full: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor received income from renting out three cottages at Royal Lodge, where he paid no rent himself, a British public spending watchdog found.
summary_public: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor received income from renting out three cottages at Royal Lodge, where he paid no rent himself, a British public spending watchdog found.
